Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jake W. Schulte, Esq., ENTORNO LAW, LLP, 619-629-0527, jake@entornolaw.com for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Sandler, Esq., BROWNSTEIN HYATT FARBER SCHRECK, LLP, 310-500-4600, jsanfler@bhfs.com for Defendant TARTE, INC.

NOT ARGUED. Court and counsel discuss the 8/16/23 email sent to the court by counsel Jake Schulte, indicating to the court that parties have agreed to re-notice today's motion to November 17, 2023. Counsel also indicates to the court, that this matter is stayed as part of a coordination effort by Defendant Tarte, and several other defendants facing TiO2 Prop 65 enforcement in different California counties. The coordination petition was granted and this action is to be transferred to Alameda County, subject to later remand.

Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is off calendar per the agreement of counsel and Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
